summary: 50 unique test failures across various Hibernate ORM test suites running on OpenJDK 25 with hsqldb backend. Tests are executing but failing at runtime.
root_cause: Multiple test cases are failing during execution. Failures span diverse test classes (SchemaDatabaseFileGenerationFailureTest, SchemaUpdateTaskSettersTest, ToOneMultipleFetchesTest, SchemaExportTaskSettersTest, EventListenerDuplicationStrategyTest, and others), but specific assertion error messages and stack traces are not available in the provided context.

evidence.reason: Test execution infrastructure (Gradle Test Executor) indicates tests reached runtime execution phase rather than failing at compilation
Build progressed past compilation to test execution phase, demonstrating successful compilation before test execution
Multiple concurrent Gradle Test Executor instances show parallel test execution with failures across different test classes

suggested_fix: Obtain full test execution logs with stack traces and assertion failure details to identify specific failure causes. Tests can be re-run locally on the same OpenJDK 25 and hsqldb configuration to reproduce and debug failures.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
